text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm in the camp lodge getting some work done
while the racers are out on break.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I see you're hard at work, Trainer. Are those all
adjustments to my regimen?
choice_data_list:
Yep. It's important to make the best out of the
season.

Yep. It's important to make the best out of the
season.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I appreciate your consideration.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
By the way, are you staying hydrated? Would you
like a glass of sweetened barley tea?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I know what you're thinking: sugar, in barley tea?
Surprising, I know... but it works well.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Please, have some, and we can relax for—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Relax?! Nuh-uh!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Not when you and I have a score to settle, Grass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh... El... What has gotten into you all of a
sudden?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The power of el sol! The crashin' waves onto la
playa! They call to me!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
In other words, your excitement has bubbled
over, and you want me to help you burn off the
excess energy?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's one way to put it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Let's do this, Grass! A fight! A competition! I need
some kinda challenge!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... But this is so sudden...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's smile seems forced, but this is a
chance to face a rival who will be racing against
her in the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She might learn something useful. With that in
mind...
choice_data_list: How about a game of beach flags?
How about a battle of endurance?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: So, a race to grab a flag stuck in the sand?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
A proper activity for some beach-time fun! Let's
do it! Ándale! Ándale!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Be reasonable, El. You can't just up and start—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh? Chickenin' out, Grass?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Well, you always were one of them "take it slow"
types. Can't blame ya for turnin' tail when the
goin' gets tough!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Talk all you want. Your cheap little taunts won't
be getting under my skin.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'll humor you for one round, and one round only.
So I hope that makes you happy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, a one-off beach flag match gets
underway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoooosh!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?! Q-qué rápida!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Have I ever told you?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I've dabbled in the sword-drawing art of iaido, so
I have a bit of confidence in my reaction time. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, due to El Condor Pasa's constant
requests for a rematch, Grass Wonder ends up
taking her on several more times with a confident
smile.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So... if I've understood you correctly, there's a
challenge to eat piping hot food with the AC off?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! Trainer, that's a death wish.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I guess you don't know. Grass might not look it,
but she hates the heat!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Like right before bed when it's super humid and
hot, sometimes her tummy—

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! I-is it just me, or did it suddenly get kinda
chilly?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Thank you for the wonderful
suggestion, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
However, we are Umamusume. We settle things
with our legs. Therefore...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Why don't we have a race, El? ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It'll help you work off aaaall that excess energy.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: HYAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All in all, getting to run alongside El Condor Pasa
seems to have been a fruitful experience for
Grass Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later that night, I return to the beach to find...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Nghh... I went a bit overboard this afternoon... I'm
gonna be sore tomorrow.
choice_data_list: You did great, El Condor Pasa.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ah, Grass's trainer! Buenas noches.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Gracias for the suggestion earlier! It was the
release I really needed!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But I think I ran my tank too dry...
choice_data_list: You and Grass seem like good friends.
You and Grass seem like good friends.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Haha! Do we?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I tell ya, though. Back when we first met...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I thought she was a snooze fest 'n a half!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It was durin' the entrance exam for Tracen
Academy.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
First we all had a once-over to gauge our
potential. Then it was time to race...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But me? I was bored outta my mind.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
(Hmmm... I know it's just the entrance exam, but I
thought Tracen Academy'd be more, I dunno,
challengin'?)

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
(Like, more passion, more flair. More KA-BOOM!
...That's what I'm after.)

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. Might you be El Condor Pasa, by any
chance?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué? Ah, yep! That's me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You and I have been assigned to the same racing
block. My name is Grass Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Even chance meetings are predetermined. May we
both have a fruitful race.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'll see you on the track.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh, ditto...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And that was all! Can ya believe it?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We were right before a race! A big one, with our
careers on the line!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But she's all lackadaisy 'n smilin'. Where's the fire?
Where's the drive?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Talk about a letdown. Why do I gotta run with
this snooze fest, ya know?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But then...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Fly! Soar! INTO THE SKYYYY!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, look how long her stride is! She did crazy
good on the other tests too, but this—this is on a
whole 'nother level!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: She's not the only one.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Weren't you paying attention in the fitness test?
The one who really put us all to shame was...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Haaah!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I could tell she was different.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Her form, her aura, her guts! Grass was nothin'
like the rest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Durin' the race, I'd get the lead, she'd take it,
then me again, back and forth. Finally endin' in a
tie.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It was my first taste of it, the burnin' desire
beneath that mellow grin.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I was shakin' in my cleats.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's when I knew!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Heh!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That if I wanna prove myself the world's strongest
racer, I've gotta beat Grass Wonder at her best.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna take her down head-on when she's
givin' it her all!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And then everyone'll see that no one's faster than
the one, the only... El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can see the determination burning in El Condor
Pasa's eyes.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's gotta be me.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I swear I'll have those gentle blue eyes boiling as she watches me tear down the turf!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oops! I said a little too much there!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'll fill ya in later, after the startin' gate opens!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Adiós... 'Til the Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, El Condor Pasa runs like the wind
into the night.
